results.rendered_html: śakra—jit m. ‘I˚'s conqueror’, N. of the son of Rāvaṇa (his first name was Megha-nāda, but after his victory over Indra, described in the Rāmāyaṇa, Uttara-k˚, xxxiv , it was changed by Brahmā to Śakra-jit = Indra-jit q.v.; he was killed by Lakṣmaṇa),  R. ;  Ragh.  &c.
